gaps: generic endpoint wrappers do not provide contact-aware schedule briefing, triage, availability shortlisting, or confirmation-gated assisted booking workflows
patterns: scheduling CLIs typically expose list/get/create endpoint mirrors

novel_features.name: Schedule brief
novel_features.description: Produce a contact-aware schedule brief for a day or date range.
novel_features.rationale: Agents need one compact read-only view before preparing meeting context.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this before drafting prep notes or deciding whether a booking needs attention.

novel_features.name: Schedule triage
novel_features.description: Identify booking problems such as missing meeting URLs, duplicate contacts, off-hours bookings, cancelled bookings, and incomplete contact data.
novel_features.rationale: Agents need a read-only risk queue before taking scheduling actions.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this to decide which bookings require operator review.

novel_features.name: Availability shortlist
novel_features.description: Fetch available TidyCal timeslots for a booking type and rank a paste-ready shortlist by date window, timezone, preference, and weekend policy.
novel_features.rationale: Agents should use the real availability endpoint rather than computing free/busy locally.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this when proposing meeting options in chat or email.

novel_features.name: Follow-up queue
novel_features.description: Create an AI-ready follow-up queue from recent bookings without sending messages or notifications.
novel_features.rationale: Agents need structured follow-up tasks while keeping message sending explicit and separate.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this to prepare follow-up tasks after recent meetings.

novel_features.name: Assisted booking
novel_features.description: Book on behalf of a contact through an inspectable dry-run and explicit confirmation gate.
novel_features.rationale: Agents can prepare the exact booking payload but must not create bookings without confirmation.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this only when the operator has approved the booking details.
